# Harvx Performance Benchmark Baseline
#
# Generated with: make bench
# To update: make bench-update-baseline
#
# This file is compared against current benchmark runs using benchstat
# to detect performance regressions. Each update should be accompanied
# by a commit noting the reason for the baseline change.
#
# Placeholder baseline -- run `make bench-update-baseline` to populate
# with actual measurements from your hardware.
